note: Completed on the .NET 11 preview target: CI uses a reusable build workflow with OS matrix, concurrency, docs-only skips, package caching, coverage gate, Codecov OIDC, CodeQL, OpenSSF Scorecard, pinned actions, trusted-publishing release wiring, Release Drafter notes, production-nuget environment, smoke workflows, and release checklist. Local build validation remains gated by installing the .NET 11 preview SDK.
description: Modernize GitHub Actions to 2026 SOTA for a .NET dotnet-tool OSS project
